controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - concentration risk management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks -
Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - concentration risk management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon issuance
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect immediately upon issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rcbs' and individually as 'rcb')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Rural Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'RCBs' and individually as 'RCB').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rcbs' and individually as 'rcb')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981
controls.control_description:
In this context, rural co-operative banks shall mean State Co-operative Banks and Central
Co-operative Banks, as defined in the National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development
Act, 1981.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract supervisory and enforcement action as applicable
controls.control_description:
Non-compliance with any of the provisions contained in these Directions shall attract
supervisory and enforcement action as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract supervisory and enforcement action as applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear the
meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise paid up capital and free reserves
controls.control_description: (1) "Capital fund" or "CF" shall comprise paid up capital and free reserves.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise paid up capital and free reserves

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included for the purpose
controls.control_description:
Reserves
created by way of revaluation of Fixed Assets, etc., if any, should not be included for
the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meanings respectively assigned to them in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981 (61 of 1981)
controls.control_description:
<image>
(2) "Central co-operative bank" and "State co-operative bank" shall have the
meanings respectively assigned to them in the National Bank for Agriculture and
Rural Development Act, 1981 (61 of 1981).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meanings respectively assigned to them in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981 (61 of 1981)

controls.control_objective: To ensure include funded credit limits like working capital limits, short term / temporary loans and block capital facilities like term loans, interim / bridge
controls.control_description:
(3) "Exposure" shall include funded credit limits like working capital limits, short term /
temporary loans and block capital facilities like term loans, interim / bridge loans
granted by an RCB either from out of its own resources or out of the refinance
assistance availed of by it from higher financing agencies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include funded credit limits like working capital limits, short term / temporary loans and block capital facilities like term loans, interim / bridge

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include non- funded financial accommodations like guarantees, letter of credit, etc
controls.control_description:
It shall also include non-
funded financial accommodations like guarantees, letter of credit, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include non- funded financial accommodations like guarantees, letter of credit, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for arriving at the exposure in the case of cash credit limits
controls.control_description:
The
sanctioned limit or loan outstanding whichever is higher, shall be reckoned for
arriving at the exposure in the case of cash credit limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for arriving at the exposure in the case of cash credit limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for the purpose of exposure
controls.control_description:
In the case of term loan,
outstanding amount may be reckoned for the purpose of exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for the purpose of exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account for the purpose
controls.control_description:
However, in the
case of non-funded credit limits, only 50 per cent of such limits, or the outstanding,
whichever is higher, may be taken into account for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure include individuals, individual partners in partnership firms, sole proprietors, partnership firms and unincorporated bodies
controls.control_description:
(4) "Individuals" shall include individuals, individual partners in partnership firms, sole
proprietors, partnership firms and unincorporated bodies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include individuals, individual partners in partnership firms, sole proprietors, partnership firms and unincorporated bodies

controls.control_objective: To ensure include incorporated bodies which are outside the definition of "individuals"
controls.control_description:
(5) "Units" shall include incorporated bodies which are outside the definition of
"Individuals".
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include incorporated bodies which are outside the definition of "individuals"

controls.control_objective: To ensure be computed as the sum of share capital, reserves including provisions and excluding the balance under agricultural credit stabilisation fund (acsf)
controls.control_description:
(6) "Lendable Resources" or "LR" shall be computed as the sum of share capital,
reserves including provisions and excluding the balance under Agricultural Credit
Stabilisation Fund (ACSF), deposits and borrowings less sum of optimum liquid
assets (35 per cent of DTL), Fixed Assets, accumulated losses and any other
commitments except loans and advances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be computed as the sum of share capital, reserves including provisions and excluding the balance under agricultural credit stabilisation fund (acsf)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as used in commercial
parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive board-approved policy, which shall inter-alia include the following, with the details outlined in the ensuing paragraphs
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall put in place a comprehensive Board-approved policy, which shall inter-alia
include the following, with the details outlined in the ensuing paragraphs.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive board-approved policy, which shall inter-alia include the following, with the details outlined in the ensuing paragraphs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be uniform for both state co-operative banks (stcbs) and central co-operative banks (ccbs) irrespective of whether the unit financed is within the coo
controls.control_description:
The exposure norms shall be uniform for both State Co-operative Banks (StCBs) and
Central Co-operative Banks (CCBs) irrespective of whether the unit financed is within the
cooperative fold or outside the cooperative fold.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be uniform for both state co-operative banks (stcbs) and central co-operative banks (ccbs) irrespective of whether the unit financed is within the coo

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to (1) the loan sanctioned / outstanding to primary agricultural credit society (pacs), and other credit societies
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to (1) the loan sanctioned / outstanding to primary agricultural credit society (pacs), and other credit societies

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be certain circumstances requiring an rcb to extend financial assistance to certain units / sectors in excess of the cut-off limits
controls.control_description:
and
(5) credit limits separately prescribed by the RBI (for purposes like food credit limits,
and housing (also refer illustrations given under paragraph 12 below), etc.)
Note: There may be certain circumstances requiring an RCB to extend financial
assistance to certain units / sectors in excess of the cut-off limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be certain circumstances requiring an rcb to extend financial assistance to certain units / sectors in excess of the cut-off limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure , with relevant details, seek specific relaxations from nabard
controls.control_description:
In such cases, the
RCB may, with relevant details, seek specific relaxations from NABARD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , with relevant details, seek specific relaxations from nabard

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in exceptional cases, permit the rcb to extend such finance exceeding the exposure limits, based on merits of the individual case
controls.control_description:
NABARD may,
in exceptional cases, permit the RCB to extend such finance exceeding the exposure
limits, based on merits of the individual case.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in exceptional cases, permit the rcb to extend such finance exceeding the exposure limits, based on merits of the individual case

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to extend finance to individuals for purchase of shares in cooperative processing societies
controls.control_description:
The RCB may continue to extend finance to individuals for purchase of shares in
cooperative processing societies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to extend finance to individuals for purchase of shares in cooperative processing societies

controls.control_objective: To ensure include inter alia provisions relating to fixing purpose-wise ceilings, safeguards to be followed, monitoring to be done including physical / periodical verification of assets, etc
controls.control_description:
The Board-approved policy for sanction of loans and advances to individuals shall
include inter alia provisions relating to fixing purpose-wise ceilings, safeguards to be
followed, monitoring to be done including physical / periodical verification of assets, etc,
subject to overall ceilings prescribed in the Table below for loans other than housing loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include inter alia provisions relating to fixing purpose-wise ceilings, safeguards to be followed, monitoring to be done including physical / periodical verification of assets, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure also obtain
controls.control_description:
RCBs should also obtain, where necessary, permission from the Registrar of Cooperative
Societies and ensure suitable provisions in its bye-laws for financing of individuals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also obtain

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sanctioned after taking into consideration the following aspects: i
controls.control_description:
An RCB having assessed net worth equal to or
more than ₹100 crore
Provided that in case the individual borrower has already availed of a housing loan or a
loan for any other activity well within the limit as prescribed in Section C of this Chapter,
the limit for additional loans, housing, or others, shall be sanctioned after taking into
consideration the following aspects:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sanctioned after taking into consideration the following aspects: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be limited to the amount arrived after subtracting exposure under section c to the individual borrower from (a) maximum housing loan exposure or (b) m
controls.control_description:
If an RCB already has exposure to an individual borrower as prescribed in Section
C, then the exposure under housing loan to that individual borrower as prescribed
in Section D shall be limited to the amount arrived after subtracting exposure under
Section C to the individual borrower from (a) maximum housing loan exposure or (b)
maximum eligible limit under Section C, whichever is higher.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be limited to the amount arrived after subtracting exposure under section c to the individual borrower from (a) maximum housing loan exposure or (b) m

controls.control_objective: To ensure be limited to the amount arrived after subtracting housing finance availed by the individual borrower from the maximum permissible exposure under sect
controls.control_description:
If an RCB already has exposure under the housing finance norms as prescribed in
Section D, then the exposure under Section C to that individual borrower shall be
limited to the amount arrived after subtracting housing finance availed by the
individual borrower from the maximum permissible exposure under Section C.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be limited to the amount arrived after subtracting housing finance availed by the individual borrower from the maximum permissible exposure under sect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to that individual borrower
controls.control_description:
In
case, the exposure under housing finance is more than the maximum exposure
allowed under Section C to an individual borrower, then no further exposure shall be
allowed to that individual borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to that individual borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that:
controls.control_description: Explanation: For computation of Net Worth, a bank shall ensure that:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be linked to capital fund (cf), while sector-wise exposure norms shall be linked to the lendable resources (lr) as on march 31 of the latest audited b
controls.control_description:
The unit-wise exposure norm shall be linked to Capital Fund (CF), while sector-wise
exposure norms shall be linked to the Lendable Resources (LR) as on March 31 of the
latest audited Balance Sheet of the RCB, based on the 'rating' of the RCB given by
NABARD after the inspection of the RCB conducted under Section 35(6) of B.R.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be linked to capital fund (cf), while sector-wise exposure norms shall be linked to the lendable resources (lr) as on march 31 of the latest audited b

controls.control_objective: To ensure evaluate the credit risk itself, especially when extending financial assistance to bigger borrowers and take its own credit decisions, based on commer
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall evaluate the credit risk itself, especially when extending financial
assistance to bigger borrowers and take its own credit decisions, based on commercial
judgement and market information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to evaluate the credit risk itself, especially when extending financial assistance to bigger borrowers and take its own credit decisions, based on commer

controls.control_objective: To ensure restrict its exposure to a single unit within the 'net owned funds' of the unit concerned
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of containing the credit risk, the RCB
may restrict its exposure to a single unit within the 'net owned funds' of the unit concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to restrict its exposure to a single unit within the 'net owned funds' of the unit concerned

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned based on the audited balance sheet as on march 31 of the preceding financial year
controls.control_description:
The total assets shall be reckoned based on the audited balance sheet as on
March 31 of the preceding financial year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned based on the audited balance sheet as on march 31 of the preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure desist from financing the commercial real estate sector
controls.control_description:
An RCB, in view of its primary role of lending for activities related to agriculture and
rural development, should desist from financing the commercial real estate sector.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to desist from financing the commercial real estate sector

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend finance to commercial real estate-residential housing (cre- rh) within the existing aggregate housing finance limit of five per cent of its tot
controls.control_description:
An RCB may extend finance to Commercial Real Estate-Residential Housing (CRE-
RH) within the existing aggregate housing finance limit of five per cent of its total assets
(reckoned based on the audited balance sheet as on March 31 of the preceding financial
year).
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to extend finance to commercial real estate-residential housing (cre- rh) within the existing aggregate housing finance limit of five per cent of its tot

controls.control_objective: To ensure consist of loans to builders / developers for residential housing projects (except for captive consumption)
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, CRE-RH shall consist of loans to builders / developers for
residential housing projects (except for captive consumption).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consist of loans to builders / developers for residential housing projects (except for captive consumption)

controls.control_objective: To ensure ordinarily not include non-residential commercial real estate
controls.control_description:
Such projects should
ordinarily not include non-residential commercial real estate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ordinarily not include non-residential commercial real estate

controls.control_objective: To ensure the commercial area in the residential housing project does not exceed 10 per cent of the total floor space index (fsi) of the project
controls.control_description:
Provided that the commercial area in the residential housing project does not exceed 10
per cent of the total Floor Space Index (FSI) of the project.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the commercial area in the residential housing project does not exceed 10 per cent of the total floor space index (fsi) of the project

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained for cre-rh advances
controls.control_description:
Standard asset provision of 0.75
per cent and risk weight of 75 per cent shall be maintained for CRE-RH advances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained for cre-rh advances

controls.control_objective: To ensure include financing cre-rh and a review note on the performance of the cre-rh portfolio shall be placed before the board at least on a half- yearly basi
controls.control_description:
The Board-approved policy shall include financing CRE-RH and a review note on the
performance of the CRE-RH portfolio shall be placed before the Board at least on a half-
yearly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include financing cre-rh and a review note on the performance of the cre-rh portfolio shall be placed before the board at least on a half- yearly basi

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit its cma-1 return in the portal for electronic submission of returns (ensure portal) of nabard within 15 days from the end of the quarter as men
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall submit its CMA-1 return in the portal for electronic submission of returns
(ENSURE Portal) of NABARD within 15 days from the end of the quarter as mentioned
below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit its cma-1 return in the portal for electronic submission of returns (ensure portal) of nabard within 15 days from the end of the quarter as men

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported in cma-1 return and it shall include individual violations, unit-wise violations, sector-wise violations, violations in loans for housing
controls.control_description:
Quarter ending (QE) Due date for submission of CMA-1 return in ENSURE
Portal by an RCB
June Quarter 15 July
September Quarter 15 October
December Quarter 15 January
March Quarter 15 April
<image>
(1) Any violations of prudential limits shall be reported in CMA-1 return and it shall include
individual violations, unit-wise violations, sector-wise violations, violations in loans for
housing (both individual and sector) and marketing federations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported in cma-1 return and it shall include individual violations, unit-wise violations, sector-wise violations, violations in loans for housing

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the
issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under these
repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued,
or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if
those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect
of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions
given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure to choose whether it has violated exposure under cma norms in respective categories viz
controls.control_description:
An option has been provided in the return where banks are required to choose whether
it has violated exposure under CMA norms in respective categories viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to choose whether it has violated exposure under cma norms in respective categories viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure cause data loss in the respective tables
controls.control_description:
Here, banks
are advised to carefully select the option of 'Yes' or 'No' from the dropdown as it may cause
data loss in the respective tables, if not properly selected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cause data loss in the respective tables

controls.control_objective: To ensure to enter the rating awarded by nabard in latest inspection of the bank by selecting financial year and rating of the bank
controls.control_description:
Banks are required to enter the rating awarded by NABARD in latest inspection of the
bank by selecting financial year and rating of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to enter the rating awarded by nabard in latest inspection of the bank by selecting financial year and rating of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure to enter violations under unit-wise and individual category
controls.control_description: Banks are required to enter violations under unit-wise and individual category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to enter violations under unit-wise and individual category

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter the amount
controls.control_description:
Bank may enter
the amount, if any, under 'Non-Refundable Reserve Fund Deposits' and 'Any Other
Commitments except Loan & Advances' in the respective fields and the LR will be
calculated taking into account these two figures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter the amount

controls.control_objective: To ensure report sector-wise exposure to non-agriculture loans and advances and also to marketing federations
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, bank may report Sector-wise
exposure to Non-agriculture Loans and Advances and also to marketing federations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report sector-wise exposure to non-agriculture loans and advances and also to marketing federations
